positive: A highly detailed, stylized vector illustration featuring abstract celestial elements, such as crescent moons and flowing constellation lines, interwoven with oversized, simplified botanical forms like giant fern fronds and lunar seedpods. The design should have a strong Art Deco/Boho aesthetic, utilizing thick, clean silhouettes and graphic outlines. Composition must be centralized and symmetrical. Color palette is restricted to deep midnight blue and metallic copper accents against a crisp white background. Perfect for apparel screen printing, linocut style, high contrast, minimal shading.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, lowres, noise, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, messy, muddy, poor composition
